verse_data.topic: Planetary Rulership over Tastes and Time Periods

table_data.title: Planetary Periods and Flavours
table_data.markdown:
| Planet   | Period              | Flavour         |
|----------|---------------------|-----------------|
| The Sun  | Half a year         | Pungent         |
| The Moon | क्षण (Kshana- 48')  | Saltish         |
| Mars     | One day             | Bitter          |
| Mercury  | Two months          | Mixed           |
| Jupiter  | One month           | Sweet           |
| Venus    | 15 days             | Sour            |
| Saturn   | One year            | कषाय - Kashaya  |

raw_text:
Sl. 29
द्वितीयोऽध्यायः
63
All diseases mentioned in Chapter VI are based upon this:
e.g. Mercury governs skin diseases. Venus governs venereal
diseases. Jupiter governs brain diseases, such as madness, etc.
The Moon governs diabetes, menstrual diseases, etc.
लवणकटुकषाया स्वादुतिक्ताम्लमिश्राः
शशिरविशनिजीवारासुरेज्यज्ञनाथाः ।
अयनदिवसपक्षर्त्वब्दमासक्षणेशा
रविकुजसितसौम्या मन्दजीवेन्दवश्च ॥ २९ ॥
Sloka 29. Saline, pungent, astringent, sweet, bitter
acid, and mixed flavours have for their lords the Moon,
the Sun, Saturn, Jupiter Mars Venus and Mercury.
The Sun, Mars, Venus, Mercury, Saturn, Jupiter and
the Moon sway over periods of half a year, a day, half
a month, two months, a year, a month and a muhurta
(3 ghatikas or 48 minutes) respectively.
NOTES.

कषाय - Kashaya
Application of the principle—If illness is indicated by Saturn,
it is long-standing: if indicated by Mars, it is of short duration.
This should be applied with reference to Chapter VI.
extraction_notes: Corrected OCR error 'l'ungent' to 'Pungent' in the table.; Corrected OCR error 'श्रण' to 'क्षण' in the table for 'The Moon' row.
